description: Self-healing for a worker that stops while holding a claim: SessionEnd (graceful exit) auto-releases so the task requeues in seconds instead of waiting ~6h for the reaper (PROTOCOL.md §9, coordination-repo #13); StopFailure matcher rate_limit (a usage limit kills the turn but not the session, so SessionEnd never fires) auto-releases too and stamps the wake-retry flag kraken.py watch uses to resume the drain after the limit window resets (#60).
